votes.rationale: Deterministic local-only panel selection runner is low-risk and completes the operational loop (scores → totals → winner) without network calls or new SoT surfaces.
Bounded filesystem reads/writes under .nexus; safe-id validation + dry-run default; improves repeatability and auditability.
Unanimous consent satisfied; proceed to ratify. Winner remains UNKNOWN until scores are nonzero, preserving safety and intent.
